历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science) were approximately 5608 (2021 Science), 12301 (2022 Science), 9365 (2023 Science), 35099 (2024 Physics Category), and 12229 (2025 Physics Category). In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao, there was an abnormal fluctuation (35099), but in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 12229, with the recent two-year baseline ranking around 12229. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Physics Category: 2021: 11, 2022: 11, 2023: 10, 2024: 8, 2025: 11, 2026: 16. The 2026 plan increases by 5 students compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 45.5%), which is significant and will notably lower the ranking threshold (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 81st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a steady rise in recent years (from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026), indicating continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 Gaokao cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 49th overall (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; from 2021 to 2025, there were no records of enrollment gaps or sharp drops, so the application psychology is stable; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top nationally), which is the university's core advantage; among Physics Category majors, Data Science and Big Data Technology (Natural Language Processing direction) directly relies on the interdisciplinary field of language intelligence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the computer category, with high social popularity and good employment prospects in 2024; Business Administration is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Guangxi is about 392,000, a slight increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (about 380,000), with Physics Category examinees about 269,000, leading to slightly intensified competition; in 2026; Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai (eastern coast), which is a cross-province application for Guangxi examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is stable, with no significant change in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12229, the significant enrollment expansion of about 45.5% in 2026 (plan from 11 to 16), and the slight increase in Physics Category examinees (about 3.3%), the expansion effect far outweighs the examinee increase effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift significantly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 15513, with a range of 15013 to 16013.

In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance exam, there was a significant fluctuation (3570), but it quickly rebounded to 1557 in 2025, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1557 in recent two years. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 81st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a steady upward trend in recent years (93rd in 2021 → 81st in 2026), indicating continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance exam cycle is neutral/mixed, involving only daily management incidents such as responses to air conditioning fees, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin heat total ranking is 49th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of filing gaps or sharp drops, maintaining stable application psychology. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), which is the core advantage of the university, strongly attracting language-oriented candidates. Majors such as Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, and Law all leverage the language advantage.

In 2026, the total number of Guangxi college entrance exam candidates is approximately 392,000, a slight increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (approximately 380,000), with History Category candidates about 123,000, leading to slightly intensified competition. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai (eastern coast), which is a cross-province application for Guangxi candidates. In 2021, the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi was about 2.6%, stable in recent years, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1557, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged, a slight increase in Guangxi History Category candidates (about 3.3%), and stable school reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025 (slightly intensified competition).
